name: Lost Catalog
author: CptPuddleboat
description:
Order from the Secret Menu.

In this unofficial LANCER supplement, there are a myriad of new licenses for the original four manufacturers, as well as new core bonuses, new talents, some pilot gear, two NPC classes, and a secret exotic item.

changes: Renamed the Jünger license to the Colt
Changed IPS-N's Modernisations core bonus to be more universal and less awkward
Edited Luna's core power to not be permanent
Colt now has a passive to add bonus damage to aux attacks
